Class RegistryHolder<F extends Keyed, T>

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.skbee.api.registry.RegistryHolder<F,T>
Type Parameters:
F - Type of registry
T - Return type from registry (may differ from F)
public class RegistryHolder<F extends Keyed, T> extends Object
Holder class for registry elements
